message:
feat(dashboard): integrate new panels into dashboard system

Wire up the new MetricsPanel and HistoryPanel into the main dashboard
model and enhance the panel focus system:

Dashboard Model (dashboard.go):
- Add metricsPanel and historyPanel fields to Model struct
- Register PanelMetrics and PanelHistory in PanelID enum
- Initialize new panels in New() constructor
- Handle MetricsUpdateMsg to populate MetricsPanel with data
- Handle HistoryUpdateMsg to populate HistoryPanel with entries
- Add renderMetricsPanel() and renderHistoryPanel() methods
- Update panel focus cycling to include new panels

Commands (commands.go):
- Enhanced fetchMetricsCmd() to gather per-agent metrics:
  - Collect token counts per agent/pane
  - Calculate context percentage via tokens.GetUsageInfo()
  - Build AgentMetric slice for panel consumption
- Return rich MetricsData struct instead of flat totals
- Import panels package for data types

Existing Panels:
- alerts.go: Minor formatting adjustments
- beads.go: Formatting and focus state fixes
- panel.go: Interface consistency updates

Message Type Changes:
- MetricsUpdateMsg now wraps panels.MetricsData struct
- Provides TotalTokens, TotalCost, and []AgentMetric

Panel Focus System:
- Extended to support PanelMetrics and PanelHistory
- Proper Tab/Shift+Tab cycling through all visible panels
- Focus ring follows tier-appropriate panel visibility

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
